Sends a translated action bar message to the specified audience.

Sends a translated message to the specified audience.

Sends a translated title and subtitle to the specified audience with custom fade-in and fade-out timings.
sendTitle(Audience, String, String, TagResolver...) - Method in class me.sytex.stylize.Stylize
Sends a translated title and subtitle to the specified audience with default timings.

Sends a translated title part to the specified audience with custom timings.

Sends a translated title part to the specified audience with default timings.
stylize() - Static method in class me.sytex.stylize.Stylize
Creates a new instance of Stylize with default settings.
Stylize - Class in me.sytex.stylize
A utility class for styling text using MiniMessage, PlaceholderAPI and MiniPlaceholders.
Stylize.StylizeBuilder - Class in me.sytex.stylize
Builder for creating a Stylize instance.

T

Converts a string to a styled Component using the configured resolvers.
